name: SidebarNavigation
description: The full sidebar navigation shell — composes SidebarHeader (workspace switcher), an optional search field, a labeled main-nav item list, a supporting (Settings/Support) item list pinned to the bottom, an optional SidebarFeatureCard promo, and SidebarFooter (signed-in user). Genuinely functional: real controlled/uncontrolled active-item selection and a real search input, plus a `collapsed` prop that switches every child to its icon-only rail mode.
sourceNote: Ported from Figma node 3802:11759 (Sidebar [Navigation]). Assembled entirely from the Sidebar Components family (SidebarHeader, SidebarItem, SidebarFeatureCard, SidebarFooter) rather than re-implementing their internals — this component is purely composition + real navigation state. Second component filed under 'Product Components > Navigation', alongside the Sidebar Components primitives it's built from.

mainItems.type: { key: string, label: string, icon: string }[]

supportingItems.type: { key: string, label: string, icon: string }[]
